panels.title: RPM
panels.description: Fan rotation speed in revolutions per minute, sent as part of each high-rate vibration batch (once per BATCH_INTERVAL_MS).

targets.query:
from(bucket: "telemetry")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "telemetry")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "rpm")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: 30s, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)

title: Vigilo - Sensor Node Telemetry
description: RPM from the Vigilo ESP32 sensor node, via MQTT and InfluxDB. Vibration analysis runs separately on high-rate batches (see #36).
